title: The Wife and Her House Husband
original_title: The Wife and Her House Husband
overview: As Cassie and Matthew come to the end of a divorce, a letter from their past selves surfaces suggesting guidance in the "event of separation". They agree to do the first thing on the list, only to find themselves drawn back together.
